channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Used needles, 17th April
item.description:
Used needles left in waste area of 2-6 Cropley street building
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cropley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of College Place and Plender st, 17th April
item.description:
Tree is leaning badly over the footway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Place, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 17th April
item.description:
Vehicle has been there since I moved to Homesdale centre over 2 years ago. Vehicle is located in the 2nd car park (enter the car park and go between the buildings, opposite the bin area).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Homesdale Centre, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Gas Canisters littered, 17th April
item.description:
Another box of gas canisters dropped on the grass next to the river. Will likely end up in the river if not collected soon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Albany Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sheet of tarpaulin o/s 269-271 Halfway St, Sidcup, 17th April
item.description:
Large sheet of tarpaulin o/s 269-271 Halfway St, Sidcup on footway - causing an obstruction to people walking by
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 269, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden Table & Pram, 17th April
item.description:
Dumped on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling sign needs replacing, 17th April
item.description:
It is old and not clear. This area is frequented by dog walkers, some of whom seem unable to pick up after their dogs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawksbrook Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two young trees need new post and ties, 17th April
item.description:
Two young trees need new posts and ties.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Cherry Tree Walk, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 27 Winchester ave and mapesbury house, 17th April
item.description:
Pollarded tree debris has been here to left of Weston house fir weeks and whole road is becoming dirty no street cleaning either. TV and bags left by maps

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Household waste, 17th April
item.description:
Household waste dumped by tree & now scattered across pavements & road surface

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike parked incorrectly, 17th April
item.description:
In resi bay and on yellow lines

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206, Great Portland Street, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Out of bay voi, 17th April
item.description:
In resi bay and yellow lines

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206, Great Portland Street, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many potholes in a1 north of Clerkenwell rd, 17th April
item.description:
Many potholes sometimes force traffic to swerve onto incoming lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90-98, Goswell Road, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 17th April
item.description:
Graffiti on Kenworthy Road Health Centre premises, please arrange removal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenworthy Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement tree overlapping property, 17th April
item.description:
The pavement tree is overlapping 72 and 74 Alexandra Park Road and creating a nuisance with falling leaves and berries. Please can it be pruned back?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Alexandra Park Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Horses, 17th April
item.description:
Horses in the fields behind DA14 6LW looking abandoned and poorly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Middleton Avenue, North Cray, Foots Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa, insulation, rubbish have been fly tipped, 17th April
item.description:
Sofa Insulation Kids toys Black bin liner all have been fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balgowan Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage in the communal garden, 17th April
item.description:
For a long time, the accumulation of rubbish in our communal area has been a problem and it is not collected, the aesthetics of our garden suffers and the view from the windows is disgusting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cassland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in pavement, 17th April
item.description:
This hole is in the pavement due do a post being removed/knocked over. The post is in the floor nearby

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 17th April
item.description:
Mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Josephine Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
